summary: A Go-based CLI tool that detects, runs, and reports on assertions, likely for infrastructure or Kubernetes validation.
concerns: High volume of automated session metadata commits polluting git history
Untracked files and unstaged changes in working directory
Test files appear more prominent than implementation files in recent activity
suggestions: Add session metadata to .gitignore to reduce commit noise
Ensure all untracked files are properly committed or ignored
Focus on core implementation files over test files for feature development
